summary: Pack up to four Field1 scalar fields into an interleaved Image with a requested channel layout; channel count and extent are validated.

inputs.name: ch0
inputs.doc: The first channel (Field1) to pack into the image.

inputs.name: ch1
inputs.doc: The second channel (Field1) to pack into the image.

inputs.name: ch2
inputs.doc: The third channel (Field1) to pack into the image.

inputs.name: ch3
inputs.doc: The fourth channel (Field1) to pack into the image.

params.name: layout
params.doc: The channel layout of the assembled image; its channel count must equal the number of wired channel ports.

params.name: color
params.doc: The color transfer encoding of the assembled image.

params.name: range
params.doc: The reference-light range of the assembled image.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: The alpha representation of the assembled image.

params.name: semantic
params.doc: The semantic role of the assembled image.

perceptual.reason: image.assemble_channels interleaves scalar fields verbatim into an image; correctness is verified by an exact assembly fixture and a round-trip with image.extract_channel, not a perceptual metric
